description:
Resolve all defects found in the Deep Audit v2 for `hx-theme`.
Source: `packages/hx-library/src/components/hx-theme/AUDIT.md`

**Summary:** 30 defects — 5 P0, 14 P1, 11 P2, 0 P3

### P0 — Critical
- [ ] [P0] Dark token override mechanism is architecturally broken
- [ ] [P0] `ThemeName` does not include `'auto'`; `system` prop is untyped workaround
- [ ] [P0] High-contrast theme has no true high-contrast token set
- [ ] [P0] Three-tier token cascade is not implemented
- [ ] [P0] Bundle size almost certainly exceeds 5KB limit

Reference the AUDIT.md in the component directory for full details and code locations.
title: Audit Fix: hx-theme
